content.json:
# KAIF Research Metrics Workbook
Import this workbook, then replace placeholder resource IDs in each query item.

Required placeholders:
- APP_INSIGHTS_RESOURCE_ID
- LOG_ANALYTICS_WORKSPACE_RESOURCE_ID

content.query:
AppRequests
| project ts=TimeGenerated, ok=Success
| where ts > ago(7d)
| summarize Requests=count(), SuccessRate=100.0*countif(ok==true)/count() by bin(ts, 5m)
| order by ts asc
content.title: Request Volume and Success Rate

content.query:
AppRequests
| project ts=TimeGenerated, route=Name, dur_ms=todouble(DurationMs)
| where ts > ago(7d)
| summarize p50=percentile(dur_ms,50), p95=percentile(dur_ms,95), p99=percentile(dur_ms,99) by bin(ts, 5m), route
| order by ts asc
content.title: Request Latency Percentiles (p50/p95/p99)

content.query:
AppRequests
| project ts=TimeGenerated, code=tostring(ResultCode), ok=Success, props=todynamic(Properties)
| where ts > ago(7d)
| extend bucket=case(
    code == '429', '429',
    code startswith '4', '4xx',
    code startswith '5', '5xx',
    ok == false and tostring(props.error_type) has 'timeout', 'timeout',
    ok == false and tostring(props.error_type) has 'auth', 'auth',
    'other')
| summarize Failures=count() by bin(ts, 5m), bucket
| order by ts asc
content.title: Error Taxonomy (4xx/5xx/429/timeout/auth)

content.query:
AppDependencies
| project ts=TimeGenerated, tgt=tostring(Target), ok=Success, props=todynamic(Properties)
| where ts > ago(7d)
| where tgt has 'services.ai.azure.com' or tostring(props.component) == 'foundry'
| summarize calls=count(), success_rate=100.0*countif(ok==true)/count() by bin(ts, 5m)
| order by ts asc
content.title: Foundry Calls and Success Rate

content.query:
AppDependencies
| project ts=TimeGenerated, tgt=tostring(Target), dur_ms=todouble(DurationMs), props=todynamic(Properties)
| where ts > ago(7d)
| where tgt has 'services.ai.azure.com' or tostring(props.component) == 'foundry'
| summarize p50=percentile(dur_ms,50), p95=percentile(dur_ms,95), p99=percentile(dur_ms,99) by bin(ts, 5m)
| order by ts asc
content.title: Foundry Latency Percentiles

content.query:
AppTraces
| project ts=TimeGenerated, props=todynamic(Properties)
| where ts > ago(7d)
| extend prompt_tokens=todouble(props.prompt_tokens), completion_tokens=todouble(props.completion_tokens), total_tokens=todouble(props.total_tokens)
| where isnotnull(total_tokens) or isnotnull(prompt_tokens) or isnotnull(completion_tokens)
| summarize prompt_tokens=sum(coalesce(prompt_tokens, 0.0)), completion_tokens=sum(coalesce(completion_tokens, 0.0)), total_tokens=sum(coalesce(total_tokens, 0.0)) by bin(ts, 15m)
| extend est_cost_usd = total_tokens * 0.000001
| order by ts asc
content.title: Foundry Tokens and Estimated Cost

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where ResourceProvider =~ 'MICROSOFT.CACHE'
| where MetricName in ('cachehits', 'cachemisses')
| summarize v=sum(Total) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), MetricName
| evaluate pivot(MetricName, sum(v))
| extend hit_ratio = todouble(cachehits) / (todouble(cachehits) + todouble(cachemisses))
| project TimeGenerated, hit_ratio
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Redis Cache Hit Ratio

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where ResourceProvider =~ 'MICROSOFT.CACHE'
| where MetricName in ('connectedclients','evictedkeys','usedmemory')
| summarize avg_value=avg(Total) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), MetricName
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Redis Connected Clients, Evictions, Memory

content.query:
let src = AppTraces
| project ts=TimeGenerated, props=todynamic(Properties), msg=tostring(Message)
| where ts > ago(7d)
| extend event_type = iff(isnotempty(tostring(props.event_type)), tostring(props.event_type), case(
    msg has '"event_type":"kaif.boundary.permit"', 'kaif.boundary.permit',
    msg has '"event_type":"kaif.boundary.deny"', 'kaif.boundary.deny',
    ''
));
src
| where event_type in ('kaif.boundary.permit','kaif.boundary.deny')
| summarize permits=countif(event_type=='kaif.boundary.permit'), denies=countif(event_type=='kaif.boundary.deny') by bin(ts, 15m)
| extend permit_rate = 100.0*permits / (permits + denies)
| order by ts asc
content.title: KAIF Boundary Permit vs Deny

content.query:
let src = AppTraces
| project ts=TimeGenerated, props=todynamic(Properties), msg=tostring(Message)
| where ts > ago(7d)
| extend event_type = iff(isnotempty(tostring(props.event_type)), tostring(props.event_type), case(
    msg has '"event_type":"dns.node.pause"', 'dns.node.pause',
    msg has '"event_type":"dns.node.resume"', 'dns.node.resume',
    msg has '"event_type":"kaif.receipt.persisted"', 'kaif.receipt.persisted',
    msg has '"event_type":"dns.context.write.success"', 'dns.context.write.success',
    ''
));
let pauses = src
| where event_type == 'dns.node.pause'
| project run_id=tostring(props.run_id), request_id=tostring(props.request_id), pause_ts=ts;
let resumes = src
| where event_type == 'dns.node.resume'
| project run_id=tostring(props.run_id), resume_ts=ts;
let receipts = src
| where event_type in ('kaif.receipt.persisted','dns.context.write.success')
| project request_id=tostring(props.request_id), receipt_ts=ts;
pauses
| join kind=leftouter resumes on run_id
| join kind=leftouter receipts on request_id
| summarize paused=count(), resumed=countif(isnotempty(resume_ts)), receipt_correlated=countif(isnotempty(receipt_ts)) by bin(pause_ts, 1h)
| extend resume_rate=100.0*resumed/paused, receipt_corr_rate=100.0*receipt_correlated/paused
| order by pause_ts asc
content.title: Pause-Resume Rate and Receipt Correlation

content.query:
let src = AppTraces
| project ts=TimeGenerated, props=todynamic(Properties), msg=tostring(Message)
| where ts > ago(7d)
| extend event_type = iff(isnotempty(tostring(props.event_type)), tostring(props.event_type), case(
    msg has '"event_type":"workflow.run.start"', 'workflow.run.start',
    msg has '"event_type":"workflow.run.finish"', 'workflow.run.finish',
    ''
));
let starts = src
| where event_type == 'workflow.run.start'
| project run_id=tostring(props.run_id), start_ts=ts;
let finishes = src
| where event_type == 'workflow.run.finish'
| project run_id=tostring(props.run_id), finish_ts=ts;
starts
| join kind=inner finishes on run_id
| extend e2e_ms = datetime_diff('millisecond', finish_ts, start_ts)
| summarize p50=percentile(e2e_ms,50), p95=percentile(e2e_ms,95), p99=percentile(e2e_ms,99) by bin(start_ts, 1h)
| order by start_ts asc
content.title: End-to-End Workflow Runtime Percentiles
